commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=741132202e04faa12b5e6a5fd896f3cd3cd58f08)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds configured model choices and an argsMenu for `/model`, reroutes Discord bare `/model` to its picker, sanitizes Telegram native command callback data, and expands registry, Discord, and Telegram tests.

PR surface: Source +67, Tests +210. Total +277 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head plus the added Telegram test shows one short configured model and one long configured model produce a partial menu that hides the long model choice.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the repair path is concrete but the PR carries `clawsweeper:human-review` after prior failed repair attempts.

target.title: feat: add model switch choices to /model
